payload.answer: There is a possible status conflict. Existing memory says the Brain Slack agent is planned and open. The new information says the Brain Slack agent MVP is now implemented. If the MVP refers to the same tracked project and replaces the old status, choose approve_supersession. If the MVP is a separate milestone or partial implementation while the broader Slack agent project remains open, choose keep_both. If the new statement is incorrect, choose reject_new. If the wording needs clarification before saving, choose edit.
citations: Existing project state - The Brain Slack agent is planned, status=open
New - The Brain Slack agent MVP is now implemented

entity_resolution.reason: The new statement may refer to the same Brain Slack agent project, or specifically to an MVP subset of it. The wording suggests a temporal status transition from planned/open to implemented, but this should not be assumed without confirmation.

memory_cards.statement: The Brain Slack agent is planned, status=open

details: Preserved ambiguity between the full Brain Slack agent project and its MVP.
Did not present the older planned/open status as superseded without user confirmation.
